title: Depths Reborn
description: This mod adds the Nautilus. Work will also be done to add some aquatic mobs and mob votes, such as the crab and The Monster Of The Ocean Depths, as well as others.
body:
**_Information_**

This mod adds the Nautilus. Work will also be done to add some aquatic mobs and mob votes, such as the crab and The Monster Of The Ocean Depths, as well as others.

_**This mod will currently only be available for Forge version 1.20.1.**_
![Nautilus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd61204d4883a82ee0bf3518034eb9b88b2519ce.png)

**Added mobs**

Nautilus: added
- Its spawn area has been added.
- Its mount function has been added.
- Its boost ability has been added.
- The armor still needs to be added.

Nautilus Zombie: It will be added in future versions

Crab: It will be added in future versions

The Monster Of The Ocean Depths: It will be added in future versions

**~~Soon~~**
